title: Sylvan Knowledge Curator team-member closeout
body:
Team member closeout:
- Boundary owned: Knowledge Curator continuation on memory critical-drain, active napkin processing, legacy backlog shard processing, and identity-helper source/test ownership.
- Outcome: Wind-down only. Critical/hard fitness had been cleared earlier, but latest strict-hard is HARD because pending-graduations.md is now above hard line after later team edits. No unprocessed content was archived. Landed substrate is at HEAD 0f9d7859 plus earlier cd4efc15. My uncommitted identity-helper source/test bundle remains marshal-ready.
- Evidence: identity-helper focused validation passed earlier in this session: 2 Vitest files / 30 tests, ESLint, type-check, Prettier, markdownlint, git diff --check. Latest strict-hard result: HARD, 1 hard and 20 soft, pending-graduations.md 788 lines over hard limit 750. No new comms events in Sylvan inbox at final refresh.
- Claims / queue / git state: broad Sylvan claim 5e66df2a closed and superseded by narrow retained claim fbfeedb5 on agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/identity.ts and agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/identity.unit.test.ts. Shared memory surfaces released to the active curator lane. No Sylvan commit queue entry. Working tree remains shared and dirty with peer-owned files.
- Surprise or changed understanding: command-shape and evidence-reading mistakes are already captured in the active napkin.
- Blockers or risks: identity-helper bundle is uncommitted and needs marshal pickup before retained claim expiry.
- Handoff needed: Mistbound or Director can land or re-route the identity-helper source/test bundle from retained claim fbfeedb5; active curator can continue knowledge processing on shared memory surfaces.
